question: Berapa hari annual leave untuk karyawan full-time?
Berapa hari sick leave yang diberikan perusahaan?
Siapa yang menyetujui cuti lebih dari 10 hari?
Apa target response time untuk P1?
Apa target response time untuk P4?
Siapa yang boleh menutup major incident?
Kapan post incident review harus dilakukan?
Apa saja kasus yang tidak dapat direfund?
Berapa lama customer memiliki waktu untuk mengajukan refund?
Siapa yang menyetujui refund di atas $1000?
Apa yang harus disertakan dalam refund request?
Apa tujuan dari Incident Response Runbook?
Apa tujuan dari Employee Leave Policy?

history.content: Full-time employees are entitled to 18 days of paid annual leave.
Employees may carry forward a maximum of 5 unused leave days.
Employees are entitled to 12 days of paid sick leave annually.
Maternity leave is 90 calendar days.
Severity 1 incidents require a response within 15 minutes.
Possible containment actions include service isolation and traffic redirection.
Only the Incident Commander may formally close a major incident.
Finance teams should complete investigations within 5 business days.
Refunds are generally not provided for change of mind.
Refund requests must include supporting evidence.
Support teams must acknowledge refund requests within 1 business day.
P1 incidents require immediate escalation.
Managers should review requests within 3 business days.
Emergency leave may be granted for immediate family illness.
Partial refunds may be granted when only specific components were affected.

Severity 1 incidents require a response within 15 minutes.
Only the Incident Commander may formally close a major incident.

Refund requests must include supporting evidence.
Emergency leave may be granted for bereavement.
P1 incidents require immediate escalation.
Partial refunds may be granted.
Managers should review requests within 3 business days.
Support teams must acknowledge refund requests within 1 business day.
Maternity leave is 90 calendar days.
Possible containment actions include service isolation.
Customer refund requests must be submitted within 30 days.
Duplicate charges may qualify for refunds.
